finding_results.notes: Four targeted edits across the three flagged zones. (1) Line 149: Tommy's dock admission loses the composed capstone 'So call it what it is' and replaces with physical repetition 'I held him under.' (2) Lines 155-163: Paul's 'Protected' speech broken into shorter fragments with a mid-line pause; 'He loved you more' retained as a blurt but narrator thesis commentary stripped entirely; Tommy's response roughened to 'I know' with hands-between-knees physicality; 'almost relieved that somebody else finally knew the shape of it' cut as narrator admiring dialogue. (3) Lines 197-205: Tommy's house-breakdown compressed from three-pass diagnosis to one; cut analytical capstone 'Maybe it was all three,' polished metaphor 'checking the fence,' and thesis landing 'That's what I've got'; speech now trails off mid-phrase twice and ends on unfinished repetition. (4) Line 239: Paul's two composed thesis-metaphors replaced with stripped blunt Paul: 'He would've. I'm not going to.' Idiolect separation maintained throughout: Tommy visibly more broken and fragmentary than Paul's stripped directness.

summary: Single finding addressed with four local dialogue edits across three flagged zones. Revisions strip narrator thesis commentary, cut composed capstones and polished metaphors, compress repeated self-diagnosis into single-pass broken speech, and roughen Tommy's voice with trailing-off turns and physical gestures while keeping Paul's lines blunt and unmetaphorical. All must-land beats, tracked payoffs (martin_tommy_bond, martin_will), and state deltas preserved. No new continuity introduced. Chapter heading contract intact.
